name: app-easyappointments
description: Easy!Appointments is a highly customizable web application that allows your customers to book appointments with you via the web. It is written in PHP and uses MySQL as its database backend.

required_inputs.label: Domínio do Easy!Appointments
required_inputs.description: Subdomínio para acessar a interface do Easy!Appointments

required_inputs.label: Senha do MySQL
required_inputs.description: Senha do usuário 'root' no banco de dados MySQL (host: mysql)

required_inputs.label: Nome da Rede Interna
required_inputs.description: Nome da rede overlay Docker (padrão: OrionNet)

pre_flight_checks: DNS do URL_EASYAPPOINTMENTS deve apontar para o IP desta VPS
Banco de dados MySQL deve estar ativo (host: mysql)
post_install_guide: Acesse https://{URL_EASYAPPOINTMENTS} para configurar sua conta de administrador
O sistema criará automaticamente as tabelas necessárias no banco 'easyappointments' no primeiro acesso.
